meta.title: Power On Interio | Interior Design Company for Homes & Offices Across India
meta.description: Power On Interio plans and delivers residential, commercial office, kitchen, wardrobe, and turnkey interiors across India, including Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, and other major cities.

heroHeadline: Power On Interio designs homes, offices, and turnkey spaces across India.
heroDescription: Power On Interio plans and delivers residential and commercial interiors across India, with practical layouts, refined finishes, and dependable site execution in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi NCR, and other major cities.

aboutSection.title: A practical interior design partner for homes, offices, and utility areas across India.
aboutSection.description: We align layout, materials, and site execution so interiors across India feel polished and work smoothly every day.

commercialSection.title: Commercial interiors that work hard and look polished.
commercialSection.description: Reception areas, workstations, and meeting rooms planned for easier movement and a sharper brand presence.

servicesSection.title: Interior design, consultation, and turnkey execution across India.

clientsSection.title: Trusted by interior, construction, and workspace-led teams.
clientsSection.description: Chosen by teams that value clear planning and dependable delivery.

whySection.title: Clear planning, steady communication, and reliable delivery.

projectsSection.title: Selected interiors across homes, offices, and workplaces in India.

faqSection.title: Clear answers before the project begins.

contactCtaSection.title: Ready to discuss your interior project?
contactCtaSection.description: Share the site, scope, and timeline, and we’ll help you define the right next step for your home, office, or turnkey fit-out anywhere in India.
